_note: PR #29 batch-path smoke fixture. Mixes anonymized synthetic fixtures from PR #12 + PR #18 + PR #26 + PR #28 to exercise (a) parsed_metric_pair (broker_a_op_up.pdf), (b) target_price_only (target_price_only.pdf), (c) ambiguous_year_pivot (real_layout_variant_ambiguous_year_pivot.pdf), (d) year_pivot_no_revision_pair (real_layout_year_pivot_forecast_only.pdf), (e) target_price_only via side-anchor target-price form (real_layout_side_anchor_target_price_only_rejected.pdf). Used by examples/run_inventory_batch_smoke.py to verify the parser_batch_summary.json shape end-to-end. No PDFs / extracted text / output JSON committed; entries are illustrative.
